title: Buttery Scallion Sandwich
description: A rich and savory sandwich filled with buttery goodness and a hint of scallion. Perfect for a quick snack or light lunch.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Butter one side of two slices of bread.
Place the slices, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Add a small amount of butter to the top of each slice.
Add a few slices of scallion on top of the butter.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Flip the sandwiches over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
